(Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the opioid class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
551 OPIOID_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD OPIOID_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Drug Risk (Indication): Opioid (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the opioid class and whether there was an indication noted for all
